data.title: dso:sprint skill resolution falls back to Read after 2 Skill tool attempts on session load
data.description: On session load, the orchestrator invokes Skill(dso:sprint) twice without success, then falls back to reading the SKILL.md file directly via the Read tool and executes the sprint phase without properly loading the skill via the Skill tool. Log evidence: two consecutive Skill(dso:sprint) calls both return 'Successfully loaded skill', but the orchestrator then states 'I have the SKILL.md content' and proceeds — indicating it used a Read fallback rather than the Skill tool result. Root cause likely in how the sprint skill content is surfaced or consumed after Skill tool invocation.
